title: Wisconsin
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Wisconsin

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Wisconsin

You can apply for Medicaid in Wisconsin by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Wisconsin

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Wisconsin

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Wisconsin

CHIP in Wisconsin

BadgerCare Plus covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for BadgerCare Plus right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about BadgerCare Plus in Wisconsin.
